author: śrīla narottama⋅dāsa ṭhākura
verses:
ka, kaliyuge śrī⋅kṛṣṇa⋅caitanya avatāra
kha, khelivāra prabandhe kaila khola⋅karatāla

ga, gaḍāgaḍi jāna prabhu nija saṅkīrtane
gha, ghare ghare harināma dena sarva-jane

ṅ, uccaiḥsvare kā̐de prabhu jīvera lāgiyā
ca, cetana karāna jīve kṛṣṇa-nāma diyā

cha, chala chala kare ā̐khi nayanera jale
ja, jagat pavitra kaila gaura⋅kalevare

jha, jhala jhala mukha jena pūrṇa śaśadhara
ña, emata ta’ dekhi nāi dayāra sāgara

ṭa, ṭalamala kare aṅga bhāvete vibhola
ṭha, ṭhamake ṭhamake cale bale hari-bola

ḍa, ḍorahi kaupīna kṣīṇa kaṭira upare
ḍha, ḍhaliyā ḍhaliyā paḍe gadādharera kroḍe

ṇa, āna parasaṅga gorā nā śune śravaṇe
ta, tāna māna gāna rase majāila mane

tha, thira nāhi haya prabhura nayanera jala
da, dīna hīna janere dhariyā deya kola

dha, dhoyāiyā pūrava pirīti parasaṅga
na, nā jāni kāhāra bhāve hoila tri-bhaṅga

pa, premarase bhāsāila akhila⋅saṁsāra
pha, phuṭala śrī-vṛndāvana suradhunī⋅dhāra

ba, brahmā, maheśvara jā̐’re kare anveṣaṇa
bha, bhāviyā nā pā’na jā̐’re sahasra-locana

ma, matta⋅mātaṅga⋅gati madhura mṛdu hāsa
ja, jaśomatī mātā jā̐’ra bhuvane prakāśa

ra, ratipati jini rūpa ati manorama
la, līlā lāvaṇya jā̐’ra ati anupama

ba, vasudeva⋅suta sei śrī⋅nanda⋅nandana
śa, śacīra nandana ebe bale sarva-jana

ṣa, ṣaḍbhuja rūpa hailā atyāścaryamaya
sa, sāvadhāna, prāṇanātha gorā⋅rasamaya

ha, hari hari bala bhāi, kara mahāyajña
kṣa, kṣititale janmi’ keha nā haiya avijña

e’ cautriśa padāvalī je kare kīrtana
dāsa narottama māge tā̐hāra caraṇa
en_translation:
Ka - In the Age of Kali, Lord Śrī Kṛṣṇa Caitanya is the incarnation. Kha - He took up the mṛdaṅga drum and karatālas to arrange His pastimes.

Ga - The Lord rolls on the ground in His congregational chanting. Gha - He gives the Holy Name to everyone in every home.

Ṅa - The Lord cries loudly for the sake of the living entities. Ca - He awakens the living entities by giving them the Holy Name of Kṛṣṇa.

Cha - His eyes are filled with tears. Ja - He purified the universe with His golden body.

Jha - His face shines like the full moon. Ña - I have never seen such an ocean of mercy.

Ṭa - His body trembles, overwhelmed with ecstatic emotion. Ṭha - He walks with a graceful gait and chants "Haribol!"

Ḍa - He wears a loincloth and a belt on His thin waist. Ḍha - Swaying to and fro, He falls into the lap of Gadādhara Paṇḍita.

Ṇa - Lord Gaura does not hear any other topics with His ears. Ta - His mind is absorbed in the nectar of melodies, beats, and songs.

Tha - The tears in the Lord's eyes are never still. Da - Embracing the poor and lowly people, He gives them His mercy.

Dha - He washes everything with the topics of previous divine love. Na - I do not know in whose mood He became bent in three places.

Pa - He flooded the entire world with the mellows of divine love. Pha - Śrī Vṛndāvana blossomed in the flow of the celestial Ganges.

Ba - He is the one whom Lord Brahmā and Lord Śiva search for. Bha - The thousand-eyed Indra cannot find Him even by meditation.

Ma - His gait is like a maddened elephant, and His smile is sweet and gentle. Ya - Mother Yaśodā is manifest in this world.

Ra - His form defeats Cupid and is very enchanting. La - His pastimes and beauty are very incomparable.

Va - He is that same Son of Vasudeva and Son of Nanda. Śa - Everyone now calls Him the Son of Śacī.

Ṣa - He manifested a six-armed form, which is very wonderful. Sa - Be careful, the Lord of my life, Gaura, is full of divine mellows.

Ha - Chant "Hari! Hari!" brother, and perform this great sacrifice. Kṣa - Being born on the surface of the earth, do not remain ignorant.

Whoever chants these thirty-four verses, Narottama Dāsa begs for his lotus feet.
